full_text:
Liu Cong 劉琮
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Liu Cong (劉琮)was born in Zhuo county, Zhuo commandery. Liu Shan’s third son. Given his fiefdom in 252 but said to be of unremarkable talent. Liu Cong was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom. Liu Cong lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
